footer.built: Built with plain HTML, CSS and JS.
hero.title: Make your data speak your language
hero.lede: I design dashboards and machine-learning predictive models for public and private entities: receivables control, revenue tracking, and data-driven collections prioritization.
services.title: What we do
services.lede: Three ways to turn your company's data into decisions, more efficient processes and better outcomes.
services.data.title: Dashboards
services.data.desc: KPIs and charts that turn scattered data into clear, actionable information ready for decision-making.
services.data.viz.label: Your operation at a glance
services.ml.title: Predictive models
services.ml.desc: Machine learning models, neural networks, econometrics and statistics to anticipate risk, demand and behavior before it happens.
services.ml.viz.label: Real-time prediction
services.ai.title: AI-powered
services.ai.desc: Chatbots, agents and AI-driven automations that streamline processes, answer questions and structure information for your team.
services.ai.viz.label: Live conversation
demos.title: Demos
demos.lede: Examples built with sample (dummy) data to show the approach — they do not correspond to any entity's real data.
demos.medicamentos.title: Medicine price finder
demos.medicamentos.desc: Look up and compare medicine prices by name, manufacturer and presentation.
demos.kpi.title: Accounts receivable KPIs — Miscellaneous revenue
demos.kpi.desc: Tracking of outstanding receivables, due dates and aging by department.
demos.predial.title: Delinquent portfolio survival — Property tax
demos.predial.desc: Survival analysis model to estimate expected time-to-payment for delinquent properties.
demos.medicamentos.note: Real public SISPRO data, limited to the 10 medications with the most complete history for this demo (the original search tool covers ~8,600 records). No private or entity-specific information is shown.
demos.kpi.note: All data in this demo is synthetic (randomly generated), designed to mirror the structure of a real receivables-tracking dashboard — it does not correspond to any entity.
demos.predial.note: This is the real model I trained for a property-tax collections process (500 trees, XGBoost, survival:aft objective) — it runs entirely in your browser, no backend. Form values are hypothetical: they don't correspond to a real property, and the model's time unit (years) is a reasonable interpretation since the original file doesn't carry that metadata.
contact.title: Contact
contact.lede: Have a use case in mind? Reach out and let's talk.
cv.profile-p1: Economist with a Master's in Economics dedicated to data science. Over 6 years across public and private institutions developing demand forecasts, default risk models, and demographic analysis. I cover the full workflow, supported by AI agents: data cleaning (Python/pandas, SQL, DuckDB), statistical modeling (R, Python — scikit-learn, statsmodels), and dashboard design (Power BI, Flask, Streamlit). My strength lies in estimation, combining econometrics and machine learning: Bayesian inference, survival models, and time series forecasting.
cv.profile-keywords: Keywords: Causal inference · Impact evaluation · Risk scoring models · Customer segmentation · Forecasting · Executive dashboards · Process automation.
cv.exp-contractor-list:
• DANE (Feb 2025 – Oct 2026) — Build and maintain demographic databases in R; estimate ARIMA forecasting models; develop ML-based population projection models using satellite imagery.
  • Alcaldía de Cali (Jun 2024 – Jun 2026) — Develop ML and survival analysis models for property tax default prediction; design Power BI fiscal performance dashboards.
  • Atenea (Aug 2024 – Jan 2025) — Build ML models to predict and prevent student dropout; manage databases using Python and PostgreSQL.
  • Acueducto de Bogotá (Oct 2023 – Mar 2024) — Estimate econometric price forecasting models; automate data collection via web scraping.
cv.exp-academic-list:
• Área Andina (Aug 2022–Jun 2023) — Lecturer: Econometrics I & II · Macroeconomics · Principles of Economics.
  • Quantil (Jan 2021–Dec 2022) — Lead predictive analytics projects; build and validate ML models in Python and R; design data pipelines.
  • Uniandes (Aug 2017–Dec 2022) — Teaching Assistant: Advanced Econometrics · Advanced Game Theory · Short-Term Macroeconomics.
  • UAO (Sep 2016–Sep 2017) — Source and analyze economic and social databases; estimate panel data and discrete choice models.
  • Icesi (Jan 2015–Jul 2016) — Lecturer: Microeconomics I & II · Econometrics II · Principles of Economics.

demos.medicamentos.page.lede: Look up the historical prices reported in SISPRO (Colombia) by medicine and presentation, with KPIs and monthly/annual trend charts.
demos.medicamentos.page.chart.preciosSub: Month by month since October 2019 (before that date the data is reported annually or quarterly — see the annual history table)
demos.medicamentos.page.msg.sinDatos: No data found for this selection.
demos.comparativo.title: Medicine price comparison
demos.comparativo.desc: Compare standardized prices ($/IU, $/mg) across brands and presentations of the same active ingredient.
demos.comparativo.note: Real public SISPRO data, cross-referenced with a catalog of 14 harmonized active ingredients for this demo. Medical samples are excluded from the comparison since they aren't sold. No private or entity-specific information is shown.
meta.comparativo.title: Medicine price comparison — Andrés Hoyos
demos.comparativo.page.lede: Compare the standardized price (price ÷ total content of the presentation, e.g. $/IU or $/mg) across brands and presentations of the same active ingredient, based on the historical prices reported to SISPRO (Colombia).
demos.comparativo.page.filtro.unidadNota: The standardized price is always calculated on the "Commercial presentation" billing unit (the full box/kit); it's the only basis compatible with the total content used to standardize.
demos.comparativo.page.chart.sub: Monthly since October 2019; quarterly before that date.
demos.comparativo.page.msg.sinDatos: No data found for this selection.
demos.kpi.page.title: Receivables tracking — Accounts payable
demos.kpi.page.lede: Receivables KPIs, statute-of-limitations tracking and notification inconsistencies for a miscellaneous revenue collections process.
demos.kpi.page.section.prescripcionSub: Calculation: latest date among enforceability, summons, personal notification, mail notification and publication, plus 5 years. Paid records or those with an active payment plan are excluded.
demos.predial.page.title: Risk simulator — delinquent property tax portfolio
demos.predial.page.lede: Estimates how long a delinquent property would take to catch up on payments, using a survival analysis model (XGBoost, AFT objective).
demos.predial.page.ficha.sub: Actual structure of the exported booster, with no training data embedded.
demos.predial.page.simulador.sub: Adjust the hypothetical property's variables and recalculate.
demos.predial.page.chart.titulo: Survival curve (probability of still being delinquent)
